# Development Workflow

## Current Process

The team follows a two-week sprint cycle with daily standups.

```SPECKIT TODO
Streamline the CI/CD pipeline:
- Reduce build time by parallelizing test suites
- Add automatic deployment to staging on merge to main
- Set up preview environments for pull requests
- Add linting and type checking as pre-commit hooks
```

## Release Process

Releases are cut every two weeks on Wednesday.

```SPECKIT TODO
Automate the release process:
- Generate changelog from merged PRs
- Bump version numbers automatically
- Tag releases in git
- Publish release notes to the team wiki
```

## Code Review

All PRs require at least one approval before merging.
